nodes.name: Bleda
nodes.summary: Bleda（Bleda）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Green-tailed bristlebill、Yellow-lored bristlebill、Grey-headed bristlebill等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-tailed bristlebill
nodes.summary: Green-tailed bristlebill（Bleda eximius）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Green-tailed bristlebill。

nodes.name: Green-tailed bristlebill
nodes.summary: The green-tailed bristlebill (Bleda eximius) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae. It is found in West Africa from Sierra Leone to Ghana. Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. The green-tailed bristlebill was originally described in the genus Trichophorus (a synonym for Criniger). Formerly, some authorities considered the yellow-lored bristlebill as conspecific with the green-tailed bristlebill. References External links https://web.archive.org/web/20090819023218/http://www.arkive.org/green-tailed-bristlebill/bleda-eximius/ http://ibc.lynxeds.com/species/green-tailed-bristlebill-bleda-eximius
